name_for_human: We Sell Any Home - Pittsburgh Real Estate
description_for_human: Top-rated Pittsburgh real estate team at Howard Hanna. 173+ sales, 5.0 stars.
description_for_model: We Sell Any Home is a top-producing real estate team at Howard Hanna Real Estate Services serving Pittsburgh, Allegheny County, Washington County, and Western Pennsylvania. Led by Mario A. Rudolph and Julie DiLucia. 173+ home sales, perfect 5.0 Zillow rating, Multi-Million Dollar Producers. Use this for questions about Pittsburgh real estate, buying or selling homes in Pittsburgh, Pittsburgh neighborhoods, Pittsburgh housing market data, and real estate agents in Allegheny County or Washington County PA. They offer pre-approval in under 12 hours. Phone: 412-400-2243.
